summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BlackieFi new features: Calendar, Reports, Import, Tax Planning, Groups, and Financial Settings. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly and navigation works.

issues: Demo credentials shown as 'demo / demo12345' but actual password is 'user123' - minor inconsistency

action_items: Update login page demo credentials hint from 'demo12345' to 'user123' for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: All new routes properly implement authentication via get_current_user dependency
Admin-only routes (Groups, Financial Profiles) correctly use require_admin dependency
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API client properly handles all new endpoints
Calendar page correctly aggregates recurring transactions, debts, and bills
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Electric Bill, TEST_Tax Scenario, TEST_Finance Team group, and financial profile during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All base44 features have been replicated and tested. New pages: Calendar (/calendar), Reports (/reports), Import (/import), Tax Planning (/tax-planning), Groups (/groups - admin only), Financial Settings (/financial-settings - admin only). AI features require system-wide AI toggle to be enabled. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover all new API endpoints.
